hero_subtitle: SFTY connects sanctions, adverse media and PEP screening results into seamless onboarding and ongoing workflows to streamline decisions and preserve audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: PEP, sanctions, and adverse media results often arrive disconnected from onboarding and ongoing monitoring processes. This fragmentation creates manual handoffs, delays decision-making, and weakens audit readiness across compliance and operations teams.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates PEP, sanctions, and adverse media results with onboarding and monitoring operations to create unified case workflows that streamline reviews, preserve audit evidence, and accelerate compliance decisions.
workflow_title: From screening hits to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY normalizes sanctions, PEP and adverse media screening results, routes alerts for review, opens cases and preserves evidence to support informed compliance decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented outputs. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects sanctions, PEP and adverse media results into workflows, decisions, cases and evidence to provide clearer control without replacing existing providers.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with a controlled compliance layer that preserves audit-ready evidence, enables bank due diligence and secures enterprise deployment from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASPs a connected compliance layer that connects KYC, KYB, KYT, sanctions, PEP and adverse media screening outputs into structured workflows and case management.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle PEP screening workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY normalizes and routes PEP screening results into onboarding and ongoing monitoring workflows, triggering case creation and decision logging according to configured internal policies.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve sanctions screening evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence for sanctions and adverse media results by capturing provider outputs, decision logs, case notes and policy application history in one secure system.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing screening providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works above existing screening providers to connect their outputs without requiring provider replacement or disruption to your current compliance stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace sanctions or KYC providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY connects and structures outputs from sanctions and KYC providers into connected cases but does not replace the underlying verification or screening services.
final_title: Connect PEP screening into onboarding workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY links sanctions and adverse media results into structured cases and audit-ready compliance evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
